category_title: Struggling readers who use physical movement and gestures to participate
scenario_title: Word building and phonics on the board
minimal_context: Luis is working at the board to write and change short words.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Let's look at the photo in this book. Who can write vet on the board?

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Points to the illustration) Hey, this is a vet.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Yes, it is. Go ahead and write the word on the board.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Writes a v) I think the next letter is a.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Let's try another one. Can you change vet to pet, Luis?

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Let's look at the photo in this book. Who can write vet on the board?

STUDENT: (Points to the illustration) Hey, this is a vet.

TUTOR: Yes, it is. Go ahead and write the word on the board.

STUDENT: (Writes a v) I think the next letter is a.

TUTOR: Let's try another one. Can you change vet to pet, Luis?

STUDENT: (Taps the board and writes p-i)
